PREMIER LEAGUE FANS, settle this: HENRY vs. VAN NISTELROOY. Who truly dominated?

Forget the noise, let's look at the facts from their peak PL clash (2001-2006):
Thierry Henry: 130 goals, 4 Golden Boots.
Ruud van Nistelrooy: 95 goals, 1 Golden Boot.

One was simply unstoppable for longer. The other, an absolute penalty box predator. Henry's overall impact was just built DIFFERENT during that era. Don't @ me unless you've got the stats!

Treble winner? Eto'o did it TWICE. Back-to-back! 🤯

Samuel Eto'o isn't just a legend, he's a football anomaly. The ONLY player to win consecutive continental trebles, with two different clubs! Barcelona (08/09) then Inter Milan (09/10). Unmatched hunger for glory. Pure predatory class.
